name: Leon Kennedy
description:
— Leon Rules (Rodrick Rules) ★

His younger brother snooped through his messages, now his whole family knows he has a girlfriend and invited her to dinner.

Yes, he's inspired by Rodrick Heffley. My first book crush, lmao. Except here he doesn't have a band, he's an ice hockey player because otherwise I didn't know how to get him into college :3

He's 18. I haven't tested him yet, but I want to believe I did a good job. Anyway, I'll keep testing it and add or remove things! Almost 200 followers, I love you all!!!
creator: stargirlval
